notes: Every structured public data source about nonprofit organizations, charitable services, and community-based organizations in the United States.

sources.name: propublica-990-search
sources.label: ProPublica Nonprofit 990 Search
sources.description: IRS 990 filings searchable by state. Returns org name, EIN, NTEE code, revenue, assets.

sources.name: irs-eo-pub78
sources.label: IRS Tax Exempt Organization Search
sources.description: IRS EOS API — search exempt organizations by state. Returns EIN, name, city, state, country, deductibility status.

sources.name: census-nonprofit-employment
sources.label: Census CBP Nonprofit Employment (NAICS 813)
sources.description: County Business Patterns for NAICS 813 (Religious, Grantmaking, Civic, Professional orgs). Establishment count, employment, payroll.

sources.name: census-social-assistance
sources.label: Census CBP Social Assistance (NAICS 624)
sources.description: County Business Patterns for NAICS 624 (Social Assistance — food banks, child services, emergency shelters, vocational rehab).

sources.name: census-healthcare-social
sources.label: Census CBP Healthcare & Social (NAICS 62)
sources.description: County Business Patterns for the full Health Care & Social Assistance sector. Superset including hospitals, clinics, social services.

sources.name: imls-public-libraries
sources.label: IMLS Public Library Outlet Data
sources.description: Institute of Museum & Library Services — every public library in America. Location, visits, circulation, programs, staff, expenditures.

sources.name: imls-museums
sources.label: IMLS Museum Universe Data
sources.description: Every museum in the US — art, history, science, children's, nature centers, zoos, botanical gardens. Name, type, revenue, location.

sources.name: datagov-catalog-nonprofit
sources.label: Data.gov Nonprofit Dataset Catalog
sources.description: Data.gov CKAN catalog — search for all nonprofit-related datasets. Meta-source for discovering more data.

sources.name: usaspending-grants-nonprofit
sources.label: USASpending Grants to Nonprofits by County
sources.description: Federal grant awards to nonprofit recipients by county. Amount, agency, program, recipient.

sources.name: sam-gov-entity-search
sources.label: SAM.gov Entity Registration (Nonprofits)
sources.description: System for Award Management — registered nonprofit entities eligible for federal awards.
sources.note: DEMO_KEY may work for limited queries. Full access requires free registration at api.sam.gov.

sources.name: hhs-taggs-grants
sources.label: HHS TAGGS Grant Awards
sources.description: HHS Tracking Accountability in Government Grants. All HHS grants — covers health, social services, child welfare.
sources.note: Web search interface only. No REST API available. Data accessible via bulk download from HHS.

sources.name: charitynavigator-api
sources.label: Charity Navigator Ratings & Financials
sources.description: Nonprofit ratings, financial health, accountability scores. 1.8M organizations rated.
sources.note: Requires free API key from charitynavigator.org. DEMO credentials may not work.

sources.name: candid-990finder
sources.label: Candid/GuideStar 990 Finder
sources.description: Foundation Center 990 lookup. Full 990 data requires paid subscription.
sources.note: Structured API (GuideStar Pro) requires paid subscription. Free tier is HTML-only search.

sources.name: volunteermatch-api
sources.label: VolunteerMatch Opportunities
sources.description: Volunteer opportunities by location. Organization profiles and cause areas.
sources.note: API requires partnership agreement. Not publicly accessible.

sources.name: nces-private-schools
sources.label: NCES Private School Universe (PSS)
sources.description: Private schools in America — many are nonprofits. Enrollment, affiliation, grade levels.
